calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Patch, Esq., 415-772-5722, Crista Welch, Esq. 415-293-6451 of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP for Plaintiff.
Colin Wood, Deputy Attorney General, and Timothy Muscat, Deputy Attorney General, 916-210-7779 of the California Department of Justice for Respondent State of California through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Respondent reports the status of applications and requests for 90 days on the third application. Petitioner objects. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SUTTER'S PLACE, INC., DBA BAY 101 CASINO's Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate.

Granted. Compliance within 30 days from today's date.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Sep-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

There being no appearance, the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SUTTER'S PLACE, INC., DBA BAY 101 CASINO'S Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate is continued to Sep-16-2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
